{#- Notebook download button (overrides Sphinx default sourcelink). - On notebook pages (sourcename ends with .ipynb): renders a primary-style button with the HTML5 `download` attribute so the browser actually downloads the .ipynb instead of opening it inline as text/plain. - On every other page: renders NOTHING. We don't expose source downloads for narrative .md / .rst pages — readers who need the source go to the GitHub repo. -#} {%- if show_source and has_source and sourcename and sourcename.endswith('.ipynb') %}
⬇ {{ _('Download notebook') }}
{%- endif %}
